calendar.matters:
Default Prove Up Hearing
Off Calendar Oct-25-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: K. Farnsworth.
Kenneth Haan, Esq. for Plaintiff: Moo Kai Community Education & Welfare Fund.
Plaintiff's Witness: Phillip W. Yee and Gene Yee, were sworn and examined.
After hearing the testimony and evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant: Ki Bum Kim as follows:
Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 3500 Geary Blvd., San Francisco.
Lease declared forfeited.
Past-due Rent $23,684.16
Holdover Damages $24,868.62
Attorney's Fees $4,570.19
Costs $641.00 for a Total of $53,763.97
Judgment signed in open court.
